quests.label: Press and wire a circuit board
Form and connect a planning rack

recipes.name: Split Log into Planks
recipes.description: Break one log into simple boards.

recipes.name: Carve Sticks
recipes.description: Thin planks into handles for early tools.

recipes.name: Craft Wooden Axe
recipes.description: A first table-made tool. Not fancy, but the tree will notice.

recipes.name: Craft Wooden Pickaxe
recipes.description: A starter pick for cracking stone into cobblestone.

recipes.name: Craft Wooden Shovel
recipes.description: A plank shovel head on a pair of simple handles.

recipes.name: Craft Tree Tap
recipes.description: A hollow wooden tap for drawing sticky resin from rubber trees.

recipes.name: Craft Stone Axe
recipes.description: A cobblestone axe head on a simple stick handle.

recipes.name: Craft Stone Pickaxe
recipes.description: Cobblestone across the top with a pair of sturdy handles.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Axe
recipes.description: An iron axe head on a familiar stick handle.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Pickaxe
recipes.description: Iron across the top for the first serious mining step.

recipes.name: Craft Diamond Axe
recipes.description: A hard crystal axe head mounted on steel rods.

recipes.name: Craft Diamond Pickaxe
recipes.description: Hard crystal teeth on steel rods for heavy LV mineral work.

recipes.name: Craft Diamond Shovel
recipes.description: A hard crystal shovel head mounted on steel rods.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Shovel
recipes.description: An iron shovel head on a familiar stick handle.

recipes.name: Knap Flint
recipes.description: Pick through gravel until a sharp flint piece turns up.

recipes.name: Craft Stone Hammer
recipes.description: A crude hammer for breaking ore into better furnace feed.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Hammer
recipes.description: A heavier hammer that lasts much longer than stone.

recipes.name: Crush Iron Ore
recipes.description: Hammer iron ore into a richer furnace feed.

recipes.name: Crush Copper Ore
recipes.description: Hammer copper ore into a richer furnace feed.

recipes.name: Crush Tin Ore
recipes.description: Hammer tin ore into a richer furnace feed.

recipes.name: Craft Pestle & Mortar
recipes.description: A rough stone cup and pestle for grinding early ingots into dust.

recipes.name: Craft Stone Shovel
recipes.description: A cobblestone shovel head on a pair of simple handles.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Pestle & Mortar
recipes.description: Iron plates form a sturdier grinding cup with a simple handle.

recipes.name: Craft Bronze Pestle & Mortar
recipes.description: Bronze plates make the longest-lasting early grinding cup.

recipes.name: Build Primitive Furnace
recipes.description: Eight cobblestone make a fuel-fed box for slow ore smelting.

recipes.name: Mold Unfired Brick
recipes.description: Press a lump of clay into a brick shape before firing it.

recipes.name: Craft Bucket
recipes.description: Three iron plates folded into a simple water bucket.

recipes.name: Cook Pipe Sealant
recipes.description: Sticky resin boiled into a simple sealant for early fluid handling.

recipes.name: Pack Coke Oven Bricks
recipes.description: Brick, clay, and sand make refractory blocks for the first creosote oven.

recipes.name: Pack Firebricks
recipes.description: Dense sanded brick for the first bricked blast furnace.

recipes.name: Build Well
recipes.description: A brick ring and bucket make the first steady water source.

recipes.name: Build Steam Boiler
recipes.description: A bronze boiler shell that turns fuel and well water into steam.

recipes.name: Build Iron Tank
recipes.description: Iron plates and a bucket make a small tank for awkward early steam and liquid layouts.

recipes.name: Build Steel Tank
recipes.description: Rivet eight steel plates around a bucket core to make a high-pressure storage block.

recipes.name: Standard Chest
recipes.description: A reinforced wooden chest for storing item stacks directly on the factory floor.

recipes.name: Hopper
recipes.description: An expensive early item mover. Set one side to input and another to output so it can pull from a machine and push into the next stop.

recipes.name: Build Copper Steam Pipes
recipes.description: Basic copper pipework for slow steam transfer.

recipes.name: Build Bronze Steam Pipes
recipes.description: Bronze pipework with a better transfer rate.

recipes.name: Build Steel Fluid Pipes
recipes.description: Heavy steel pipework for fast steam and liquid transfer.

recipes.name: Craft Steam Casing
recipes.description: Eight bronze plates tightened around a reusable wrench form a heavy steam machine shell.

recipes.name: Build Steam Macerator
recipes.description: A steam-driven grinder for ores and dusts.

recipes.name: Build Steam Forge Hammer
recipes.description: A bronze hammer frame that automates plate work.

recipes.name: Build Steam Compressor
recipes.description: A compact bronze press for ceramic and metal compression.

recipes.name: Build Steam Extractor
recipes.description: A bronze extractor for sticky resin and early rubber prep.

recipes.name: Build Steam Alloy Smelter
recipes.description: A bronze alloy box for automated bronze firing.

recipes.name: Build Steam Furnace
recipes.description: A bronze steam oven that smelts much faster than the primitive furnace.

recipes.name: Build Steam Auto Miner
recipes.description: A bronze-framed mining head that burns through steam for slow passive ore work.

recipes.name: Craft LV Machine Casing
recipes.description: Steel plates riveted into the first low-voltage machine casing.

recipes.name: Craft LV Machine Hull
recipes.description: Wrap the LV casing with tin wire and steel plate to make an electric machine hull.

recipes.name: Build Steam Turbine
recipes.description: Steel, bronze, and the first circuit turn steam into LV power.

recipes.name: Build Tin Cables
recipes.description: Insulate tin wire into lossy LV cable sections for the factory floor.

recipes.name: Bundle 2A Tin Cable
recipes.description: Bind two 1A cable runs into a thicker 2A LV route.

recipes.name: Bundle 4A Tin Cable
recipes.description: Bind two 2A cable runs into a 4A LV feed for the blast line.

recipes.name: Bundle 8A Tin Cable
recipes.description: Brace two 4A cable runs with aluminium plate and fresh rubber to make a heavy 8A LV trunk.

recipes.name: Craft LV Motor
recipes.description: Wind copper and red-alloy control wire around a geared steel shaft to make a reusable electric actuator.

recipes.name: Craft LV Piston
recipes.description: Bolt a motor, gear, and steel ram together for presses, hammers, and benders.

recipes.name: Craft LV Pump
recipes.description: Seal a motorized ring pump with replaceable rubber packing for extractors, canners, and chemical machines.

recipes.name: Craft LV Conveyor
recipes.description: Pair two small motors with rubber belting and cut guide wire for item-feeding machines.

recipes.name: Build 1A LV Battery Buffer
recipes.description: Build the empty buffer shell. It needs an installed LV battery before it can store or output EU.

recipes.name: Build 2A LV Battery Buffer
recipes.description: Build the two-cell buffer shell. The stronger cable bus is the only difference from the 1A shell.

recipes.name: Build 4A LV Battery Buffer
recipes.description: Build the four-cell buffer shell. It uses the same frame with a 4A cable bus.

recipes.name: Build 8A LV Battery Buffer
recipes.description: Build the eight-cell buffer shell around aluminium plates, a red-alloy control lead, and an 8A cable bus.

recipes.name: Build Liquid Steam Boiler
recipes.description: A sealed steel boiler burns creosote into stronger steam flow.

recipes.name: Build LV Macerator
recipes.description: A steel electric grinder that upgrades ore preparation for LV processing lines.

recipes.name: Build LV Forge Hammer
recipes.description: A powered hammer frame for electric plate and casing preparation.

recipes.name: Build LV Compressor
recipes.description: A circuit-driven electric press for denser LV-era part production.

recipes.name: Build LV Extractor
recipes.description: A sealed electric extractor for pressing prepared rubber pulp into solid bars.

recipes.name: Build LV Alloy Smelter
recipes.description: A coil-lined electric alloy furnace for cleaner LV material batches.

recipes.name: Build LV Furnace
recipes.description: A compact electric furnace for steady ore and dust smelting without boiler support.

recipes.name: Build LV Wiremill
recipes.description: A first electric machine frame that draws wire more cleanly than hand cutters.

recipes.name: Build LV Bender
recipes.description: An electric press that bends ingots into efficient plates.

recipes.name: Build LV Lathe
recipes.description: A powered turning frame for rods and coil stock.

recipes.name: Build LV Electrolyzer
recipes.description: Glass tubes, circuits, and steel create the first mineral splitter.

recipes.name: Build LV Assembler
recipes.description: A compact assembly bench for less wasteful LV parts.

recipes.name: Build LV Canner
recipes.description: A sealed LV machine for filling battery cells with sodium or lithium chemistry.

recipes.name: Build LV Centrifuge
recipes.description: A spinning LV frame that opens alternate aluminium dust routes.

recipes.name: Build LV Auto Miner
recipes.description: An LV machine hull, circuit, and mining head for faster passive resource work.

recipes.name: Wind Heating Coil
recipes.description: Cupronickel and red alloy wire become the first electric furnace coil.

recipes.name: Craft Heat Proof Casing
recipes.description: Firebrick, steel, and coils make one block of blast furnace shell.

recipes.name: Craft Arc Furnace Controller
recipes.description: Build the blast controller around a heatproof core, Invar shell, and three LV circuits.

recipes.name: Stage Arc Furnace Casing
recipes.description: Fit one heatproof casing for placement around the Arc Furnace controller.

recipes.name: Craft 2A LV Energy Hatch
recipes.description: Hand-fit a 2A LV Energy Hatch with extra parts and wrench work.

recipes.name: Craft LV Input Bus
recipes.description: Hand-fit a LV Input Bus with extra parts and wrench work.

recipes.name: Craft LV Output Bus
recipes.description: Hand-fit a LV Output Bus with extra parts and wrench work.

recipes.name: Craft LV Fluid Input Hatch
recipes.description: Hand-fit a LV Fluid Input Hatch with extra parts and wrench work.

recipes.name: Craft LV Fluid Output Hatch
recipes.description: Hand-fit a LV Fluid Output Hatch with extra parts and wrench work.

recipes.name: Craft Coke Oven Block
recipes.description: Bind a refractory coke oven block for the 2x2 oven shell.

recipes.name: Craft BBF Casing
recipes.description: Firebrick plates bolted into one dense blast furnace casing block.

recipes.name: Assemble BBF Multiblock
recipes.description: Stage eight BBF casings into four 2x2 factory-floor blast furnace blocks.

recipes.name: Mix Bronze Dust
recipes.description: Three copper dust and one tin dust make the first bronze batch.

recipes.name: Grind Iron Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to break an iron ingot into dust.

recipes.name: Grind Crushed Iron Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to grind crushed iron ore into dust.

recipes.name: Grind Copper Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to break a copper ingot into dust.

recipes.name: Grind Crushed Copper Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to grind crushed copper ore into dust.

recipes.name: Grind Tin Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to break a tin ingot into dust.

recipes.name: Grind Crushed Tin Dust
recipes.description: Use the pestle and mortar to grind crushed tin ore into dust.

recipes.name: Hammer Copper Plate
recipes.description: Flatten copper ingots into a useful plate with a hammer.

recipes.name: Hammer Tin Plate
recipes.description: Flatten tin ingots into soft sheets for early electrical tricks.

recipes.name: Hammer Iron Plate
recipes.description: Flatten iron ingots into a sturdy plate.

recipes.name: Hammer Bronze Plate
recipes.description: Flatten bronze ingots into a machine-ready plate.

recipes.name: Hammer Steel Plate
recipes.description: Flatten steel ingots into the first stronger machine plates.

recipes.name: Hammer Red Alloy Plate
recipes.description: Flatten red alloy ingots into soft conductive sheets for cutting.

recipes.name: Craft Iron File
recipes.description: Two iron plates and a handle make the first filing tool.

recipes.name: Craft Bronze File
recipes.description: Two bronze plates and a handle make a longer-lasting filing tool.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Wire Cutters
recipes.description: Iron plates and rods filed into a simple pair of wire cutters.

recipes.name: Craft Mechanical Piston
recipes.description: Iron framing, bronze rods, and a red alloy plate make a compact pushing mechanism for item automation.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Wrench
recipes.description: A heavy ingot-built wrench for early assembly work.

recipes.name: Craft Bronze Wrench
recipes.description: A softer bronze wrench for the first metal workshop.

recipes.name: Craft Iron Crowbar
recipes.description: A hooked iron pry bar for lifting machines and pipework from the factory floor.

recipes.name: File Iron Rod
recipes.description: File one ingot down into one rough rod.

recipes.name: File Copper Rod
recipes.description: File one copper ingot down into one rough rod.

recipes.name: File Tin Rod
recipes.description: File one tin ingot down into one rough rod.

recipes.name: File Bronze Rod
recipes.description: File one bronze ingot down into one rough rod.

recipes.name: File Steel Rod
recipes.description: File one steel ingot into a sturdy rod for early electronics frames.

recipes.name: File Steel Rings
recipes.description: File a steel rod into sealing rings for pumps and compact machine joints.

recipes.name: Cut Steel Screws
recipes.description: Cut a steel rod into small fasteners for early LV mechanical assemblies.

recipes.name: Shape Steel Gear
recipes.description: Hammer and file four steel plates into a toothed drive gear for motors and pistons.

recipes.name: Shape Aluminium Gear
recipes.description: Hammer and file four aluminium plates into a light toothed drive gear.

recipes.name: Cut Copper Wire
recipes.description: Cut a copper plate into short lengths of bare wire.

recipes.name: Cut Tin Wire
recipes.description: Cut a tin plate into bare LV cable wire.

recipes.name: File Glass Tubes
recipes.description: Score glass into fragile tubes for the first vacuum valves.

recipes.name: Cut Red Alloy Wire
recipes.description: Cut a red alloy plate into soft conductive wire.

recipes.name: Insulate Copper Wire
recipes.description: Wrap copper wire in rubber for the first safe circuit wiring.

recipes.name: Craft Resistor
recipes.description: Bind carbon dust with copper wire into a primitive resistor.

recipes.name: Printed Circuit Board
recipes.description: Wrap copper wire around a compressed wooden blank so it can carry the first LV signal paths.

recipes.name: Craft Vacuum Tube
recipes.description: Glass, red alloy, copper, and steel form the first fragile logic valve.

recipes.name: Craft Basic Electronic Circuit
recipes.description: Assemble the first LV circuit from a coated board, valves, wire, and steel support.

recipes.name: Empty Battery Cell
recipes.description: Fold battery alloy plates around a tin cable contact and rubber seal to make an empty LV battery cell.

recipes.name: Survey Kit
recipes.description: A reusable field instrument blank that records one surveyed mineral profile.

recipes.name: Coal Seam Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Coal Seam mining profile.

recipes.name: Redstone Vein Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Redstone Vein mining profile.

recipes.name: Diamond Vein Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Diamond Vein mining profile.

recipes.name: Nickel Vein Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Nickel Vein mining profile.

recipes.name: Bauxite Vein Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Bauxite Vein mining profile.

recipes.name: Lead Vein Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Lead Vein mining profile.

recipes.name: Salt Deposit Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Salt Deposit mining profile.

recipes.name: Obsidian Deposit Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Obsidian Deposit mining profile.

recipes.name: Sulfur Vent Survey Card
recipes.description: Consume one Survey Kit and eight samples to encode a reusable Sulfur Vent mining profile.

recipes.name: Reach Gate Casings
recipes.description: Four resonant casings form a permanent 2x2 breach into the Shattered Reach.

recipes.name: Steel Fluid Cells
recipes.description: Fold steel plates into two sealed 8L cells for moving process fluids by hand.

recipes.name: Build LV Mixer
recipes.description: Drive a sealed six-slot mixing drum with twin LV motors and a metered fluid pump.

recipes.name: Build LV Chemical Reactor
recipes.description: Twin pumps, sealed glasswork, and LV control contain the first fluid-phase reactions.

recipes.name: Build LV Air Collector
recipes.description: Seal twin pumps around an LV motor and control circuit to collect ambient air.

processRecipes.name: Fire Brick
processRecipes.description: Bake an unfired clay brick into a sturdy brick.

processRecipes.name: Charcoal From Log
processRecipes.description: Bake logs into a cleaner early fuel.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Iron Ingot
processRecipes.description: Slowly smelt iron ore into a tool-ready ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Crushed Iron
processRecipes.description: Smelt crushed iron ore into a tool-ready ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Copper Ingot
processRecipes.description: Slowly smelt copper ore into a usable ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Crushed Copper
processRecipes.description: Smelt crushed copper ore into a usable ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Tin Ingot

processRecipes.name: Smelt Crushed Tin
processRecipes.description: Smelt crushed tin ore into a usable ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Iron Dust
processRecipes.description: Smelt iron dust back into a useful ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Nickel Ingot
processRecipes.description: Smelt nickel ore into the heat-resistant metal needed for coil work.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Nickel Dust
processRecipes.description: Smelt refined nickel dust into an ingot.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Bronze Ingot
processRecipes.description: Fire bronze dust into a first proper bronze ingot.

processRecipes.description: Use steam power to crush iron ore into richer furnace feed.

processRecipes.description: Use steam power to crush copper ore into richer furnace feed.

processRecipes.name: Steam Crush Tin Ore
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to crush tin ore into richer furnace feed.

processRecipes.name: Steam Crush Bauxite Ore
processRecipes.description: Crush bauxite into richer electric-processing feed.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Nickel Dust
processRecipes.description: Macerate nickel ore into coil-ready dust.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Crushed Iron
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to grind crushed iron ore into dust.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Crushed Copper
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to grind crushed copper ore into dust.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Crushed Tin
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to grind crushed tin ore into dust.

processRecipes.description: Grind crushed bauxite into electrolyzer-ready dust.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Iron Dust
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to grind an iron ingot into dust.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Copper Dust

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Tin Dust
processRecipes.description: Use steam power to grind a tin ingot into dust.

processRecipes.name: Wood Pulp
processRecipes.description: Macerate planks into fine wood pulp for coated boards.

processRecipes.name: Wood Pulp
processRecipes.description: Macerate whole logs into a larger batch of wood pulp. This takes longer than planks but wastes less material.

processRecipes.name: Steam Grind Carbon Dust
processRecipes.description: Macerate coal into carbon dust for resistor work.

processRecipes.name: Coke Logs
processRecipes.description: Bake logs into charcoal faster, with only a modest creosote trickle.

processRecipes.name: Coke Coal
processRecipes.description: Bake coal into coal coke faster, trading speed for a smaller creosote draw.

processRecipes.name: Steam Hammer Copper Plate
processRecipes.description: Hammer copper ingots into plates with steam power.

processRecipes.name: Steam Hammer Tin Plate
processRecipes.description: Hammer tin ingots into plates with steam power.

processRecipes.description: Hammer iron ingots into plates with steam power.

processRecipes.name: Steam Hammer Bronze Plate
processRecipes.description: Hammer bronze ingots into plates with steam power.

processRecipes.description: Hammer steel ingots into plates for the first post-steel builds.

processRecipes.name: Steam Hammer Red Alloy Plate
processRecipes.description: Hammer red alloy ingots into signal-ready plates with steam power.

processRecipes.name: Steam Compress Firebrick
processRecipes.description: Compress firebrick feed into denser refractory blocks.

processRecipes.name: Wooden Board Blank
processRecipes.description: Compress wood pulp into a stiff wooden board blank before copper traces are added by hand.

processRecipes.name: Steam Extract Rubber Pulp
processRecipes.description: Extract sticky resin into rubber pulp ready for smelting or later chemical processing.

processRecipes.name: Steam Alloy Bronze Dust
processRecipes.description: Alloy copper dust and tin dust directly into bronze ingots.

processRecipes.name: Steam Alloy Bronze Ingots
processRecipes.description: Alloy copper and tin ingots directly into bronze ingots.

processRecipes.description: Alloy copper dust and redstone dust into two red alloy ingots.

processRecipes.name: Steam Alloy Red Alloy From Ingot
processRecipes.description: Alloy a copper ingot with redstone dust into two red alloy ingots.

processRecipes.description: Fuse silica sand into rough glass panes.

processRecipes.description: Bake unfired clay bricks with steady steam heat.

processRecipes.description: Bake logs into charcoal without feeding a separate furnace fire.

processRecipes.description: Smelt crushed iron ore faster in a steam furnace.

processRecipes.name: Steam Furnace Nickel Dust

processRecipes.description: Crush copper ore electrically into a slightly richer batch of crushed ore.

processRecipes.description: Smelt nickel dust with electric heat.

processRecipes.name: LV Furnace Lead Dust
processRecipes.description: Smelt lead dust into ingots for battery alloy.

processRecipes.name: LV Wiremill Tin Wire
processRecipes.description: Draw tin ingots into clean LV cable wire.

processRecipes.name: LV Wiremill Copper Wire
processRecipes.description: Draw copper ingots into bare wire with electric rollers.

processRecipes.name: LV Wiremill Red Alloy Wire
processRecipes.description: Draw red alloy ingots into signal wire without chewing through cutters.

processRecipes.name: LV Macerate Lead Ore
processRecipes.description: Crush lead ore into a cleaner feedstock for battery metal.

processRecipes.name: LV Macerate Crushed Lead Ore
processRecipes.description: Grind crushed lead ore down into usable dust.

processRecipes.name: LV Grind Sodium Salt
processRecipes.description: Grind salt into sodium-rich powder for simple LV batteries.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Iron Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one iron ingot into one plate without hammer waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Copper Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one copper ingot into one plate without hammer waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Tin Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one tin ingot into one plate without hammer waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Steel Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one steel ingot into one plate, saving hard-won steel.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Bronze Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one bronze ingot into one plate without hammer waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Red Alloy Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one red alloy ingot into one conductive plate without hammer waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Lead Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend one lead ingot into a plate without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Battery Alloy Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend battery alloy ingots into plates for sealed cells.

processRecipes.name: LV Bend Aluminium Plate
processRecipes.description: Bend aluminium into light machine plate after the blast furnace is online.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Iron Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn one iron ingot into two clean rods.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Copper Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn one copper ingot into two clean rods.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Tin Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn one tin ingot into two soft rods for buffers and parts.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Bronze Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn one bronze ingot into two clean rods.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Steel Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn one steel ingot into two strong rods for LV frames.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Aluminium Rods
processRecipes.description: Turn aluminium into light rods for late LV part testing.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Aluminium Rings
processRecipes.description: Turn one aluminium rod into small light rings for later machine casings.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Aluminium Screws
processRecipes.description: Cut one aluminium rod into light screws without wearing hand cutters.

processRecipes.name: LV Lathe Glass Tubes
processRecipes.description: Score glass into a cleaner batch of tubes without wearing down hand files.

processRecipes.name: LV Alloy Cupronickel
processRecipes.description: Electrically alloy a larger copper and nickel dust batch into extra coil metal.

processRecipes.name: LV Alloy Cupronickel Ingots
processRecipes.description: Remelt copper and nickel ingots into cupronickel when the ore line has already been refined.

processRecipes.name: LV Alloy Invar
processRecipes.description: Alloy two parts iron with one part nickel into stable controller metal.

processRecipes.name: Bend Invar Plate
processRecipes.description: Press one Invar ingot into a stable controller plate.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Item Conductors
processRecipes.description: Build two dense item-routing lanes from steel guides, powered conveyors, and insulated cable.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Fluid Conductors
processRecipes.description: Build two sealed fluid-routing lanes from steel rings, LV pumps, insulated cable, and chemical-resistant seals.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Steel Tank
processRecipes.description: Seal a reduced steel shell under pressure for a lower-waste tank build.

processRecipes.name: Assemble 2A LV Energy Hatch
processRecipes.description: Use powered assembly to fit a 2A LV Energy Hatch without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: Assemble LV Input Bus
processRecipes.description: Set Assembler Program 1 to fit a LV Input Bus without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: Assemble LV Output Bus
processRecipes.description: Set Assembler Program 2 to fit a LV Output Bus without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: Assemble LV Fluid Input Hatch
processRecipes.description: Set Assembler Program 3 to fit a LV Fluid Input Hatch without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: Assemble LV Fluid Output Hatch
processRecipes.description: Set Assembler Program 4 to fit a LV Fluid Output Hatch without hand-tool waste.

processRecipes.name: LV Assemble Insulated Copper Wire
processRecipes.description: Apply rubber evenly around copper wire, saving rubber over hand wrapping.

processRecipes.name: LV Assemble Resistors
processRecipes.description: Meter glue around carbon and copper wire for a reliable high-yield resistor batch.

processRecipes.name: LV Assemble Printed Circuit Board
processRecipes.description: Lay copper wire around a wooden board blank with less hand-cut waste.

processRecipes.name: Etch Printed Circuit Boards
processRecipes.description: Etch copper laminate with diluted acid into a four-board batch.

processRecipes.name: LV Assemble Empty Battery Cells
processRecipes.description: Press lead liners and battery alloy around wired, rubber-sealed contacts for a two-cell batch.

processRecipes.name: LV Assemble Lightweight Piston
processRecipes.description: Fit aluminium drive parts around an LV motor for a light post-blast piston assembly.

processRecipes.name: LV Fill Sodium Battery
processRecipes.description: Fill and seal an empty LV cell with sodium chemistry. It stores less than lithium but is easier to make.

processRecipes.name: LV Fill Lithium Battery
processRecipes.description: Fill and seal an empty LV cell with lithium chemistry for a higher-capacity battery.

processRecipes.name: LV Electrolyze Lithium Clay
processRecipes.description: Split clay with sodium dust in the electrolyzer to isolate lithium dust for better cells.

processRecipes.name: LV Electrolyze Bauxite Dust
processRecipes.description: Split bauxite dust into aluminium dust with the best early yield.

processRecipes.name: Collect Ambient Air
processRecipes.description: Power an Air Collector to compress a steady ambient air stream without consumable inputs.

processRecipes.name: LV Centrifuge Clay
processRecipes.description: Spin clay into a poor but renewable aluminium dust route.

processRecipes.name: LV Centrifuge Aluminous Gravel
processRecipes.description: Pick traces of aluminium dust out of large piles of gravel.

processRecipes.name: Separate Sticky Resin
processRecipes.description: Separate sticky resin into workable rubber pulp and reusable glue.

processRecipes.name: Separate Air
processRecipes.description: Spin compressed air into separate oxygen and nitrogen streams.

processRecipes.name: Arc Blast Aluminium
processRecipes.description: Use a heavy buffered LV draw to turn aluminium dust into the first light metal ingot.

processRecipes.name: Arc Blast Steel
processRecipes.description: Make steel quickly with buffered LV power instead of slow coke heat.

processRecipes.name: Oxygen Steel
processRecipes.description: Use a programmed oxygen feed to accelerate steel production.

processRecipes.name: Nitrogen Aluminium
processRecipes.description: Use a programmed nitrogen atmosphere to accelerate aluminium production.

processRecipes.name: Blast Steel With Coal Coke
processRecipes.description: Coal coke drives the fastest early one-ingot steel heat.

processRecipes.name: Blast Steel With Coal
processRecipes.description: Coal can run the blast furnace, but it sits between charcoal and coal coke.

processRecipes.name: Blast Steel With Charcoal
processRecipes.description: Charcoal can make first steel, but each ingot takes longer.

processRecipes.name: Macerate Sulfur Ore
processRecipes.description: Crush a Reach sulfur sample into two measures of reactive sulfur dust.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Rubber Pulp
processRecipes.description: Heat separated rubber pulp into a solid rubber bar.

processRecipes.name: Steam Smelt Rubber Pulp
processRecipes.description: Use steady steam heat to form rubber pulp into a bar.

processRecipes.name: LV Smelt Rubber Pulp
processRecipes.description: Electrically heat rubber pulp into a solid bar.

processRecipes.name: React Liquid Rubber
processRecipes.description: Cure separated rubber pulp with sulfur into a pumpable rubber compound.

processRecipes.name: Produce Sulfuric Acid
processRecipes.description: React sulfur dust with water into concentrated sulfuric acid.

processRecipes.name: Dilute Sulfuric Acid
processRecipes.description: Blend concentrated acid with water for controlled circuit-board etching.

processRecipes.name: Crush Gold Ore
processRecipes.description: Break dense gold ore into a richer early-MV feed.

processRecipes.name: Grind Crushed Gold
processRecipes.description: Prepare crushed gold for clean electric smelting.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Gold Dust
processRecipes.description: Smelt refined gold dust into a processor-grade ingot.

processRecipes.name: Bend Gold Plate
processRecipes.description: Roll soft gold into a precise signal-circuit plate.

processRecipes.name: Grind Void Quartz
processRecipes.description: Reduce Reach-grown quartz into silicon feedstock.

processRecipes.name: Grind Resonant Quartz
processRecipes.description: Reduce Resonant Quartz into fine computation-grade dust.

processRecipes.name: Smelt Silicon
processRecipes.description: Refine Void Quartz dust into imprint-ready silicon.

processRecipes.name: Charge Resonant Quartz
processRecipes.description: Load one crystal with the controlled charge needed for phase synthesis.

processRecipes.name: Grow Phase Crystals
processRecipes.description: Blend charged and void quartz around a redstone signal in a measured water feed.

processRecipes.name: Grind Phase Crystal
processRecipes.description: Mill one phase crystal into bonding dust.

processRecipes.name: Harden Die Blank
processRecipes.description: Compress four steel plates into one permanent imprinting blank.

processRecipes.name: Cut Signal Die
processRecipes.description: Use a numbered compressor setup to cut a permanent precision die.

processRecipes.name: Cut Computation Die
processRecipes.description: Use a numbered compressor setup to cut a permanent precision die.

processRecipes.name: Cut Structural Die
processRecipes.description: Use a numbered compressor setup to cut a permanent precision die.

processRecipes.name: Cut Silicon Die
processRecipes.description: Use a numbered compressor setup to cut a permanent precision die.

processRecipes.name: Print Signal Circuit
processRecipes.description: Stamp a precise processor layer while retaining the installed die.

processRecipes.name: Print Computation Circuit
processRecipes.description: Stamp a precise processor layer while retaining the installed die.

processRecipes.name: Print Structural Circuit
processRecipes.description: Stamp a precise processor layer while retaining the installed die.

processRecipes.name: Print Silicon
processRecipes.description: Stamp a precise processor layer while retaining the installed die.

processRecipes.name: Bond Signal Processor
processRecipes.description: Bond a printed circuit to silicon with conductive phase dust.

processRecipes.name: Bond Computation Processor
processRecipes.description: Bond a printed circuit to silicon with conductive phase dust.

processRecipes.name: Bond Structural Processor
processRecipes.description: Bond a printed circuit to silicon with conductive phase dust.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Crystal Energizer
processRecipes.description: Build the aluminium charging frame needed for phase-crystal synthesis.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Circuit Imprinter
processRecipes.description: Brace a precision ram with aluminium and phase-stable guides.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Blank Patterns
processRecipes.description: Laminate phase-sensitive traces into four reusable instruction patterns.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Pattern Terminal
processRecipes.description: Assemble an aluminium fabrication-network component around its dedicated processor.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Auto Fabricator
processRecipes.description: Assemble an aluminium fabrication-network component around its dedicated processor.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Fluid Storage Link
processRecipes.description: Assemble an aluminium fabrication-network component around its dedicated processor.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Memory Module
processRecipes.description: Assemble an aluminium fabrication-network component around its dedicated processor.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Fabrication Cables
processRecipes.description: Build four shielded planning-network lanes from aluminium conductors and phase-sensitive control traces.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Job Interface Faces
processRecipes.description: Build two compact machine faces for holding and dispatching physical encoded patterns.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Planning Controller
processRecipes.description: Build the structural core that schedules a complete fabrication job.

processRecipes.name: Assemble Dispatch Module
processRecipes.description: Add a structural scheduling lane for parallel fabrication work.

processRecipes.name: Insulate 1A Tin Cable
processRecipes.description: Meter liquid rubber directly onto the conductor for a reliable low-waste insulation pass.

processRecipes.name: Insulate 2A Tin Cable
processRecipes.description: Meter liquid rubber directly onto the conductor for a reliable low-waste insulation pass.

processRecipes.name: Insulate 4A Tin Cable
processRecipes.description: Meter liquid rubber directly onto the conductor for a reliable low-waste insulation pass.

processRecipes.name: Insulate 8A Tin Cable
processRecipes.description: Meter liquid rubber directly onto the conductor for a reliable low-waste insulation pass.
